default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new GrowthX contacts and review content strategy and November performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New GrowthX Contacts:** Jo Kaminska (SEO Strategy) and Jenn Peters (Content Production) are now the primary contacts following a team reorg.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**November Performance:** Strong growth despite seasonality, with organic traffic up 42% for 1st-page queries and 19% for 2nd-10th page queries.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership Strategy:** SchoolAI will publish research reports as HTML pages (not PDFs) to capture SEO value, with flexibility to add SEO-friendly sections.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:** Reporting will now focus on key events tied to revenue (admin demos) and product adoption (teacher signups/launches).](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Topics

### Team & Process Updates

  - [**GrowthX Reorg:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**Jo Kaminska:** Engagement Manager → Leads SEO strategy & analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**Jenn Peters:** Senior Managing Editor → Leads content production & quality.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [**Content Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
      - [**Slack Updates:** No longer needed; SchoolAI's Airtable automation now syncs content directly to Notion for coach review.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - **Tucker's Reviews:** Tucker requested to review Fathom topics \#6–10. GrowthX will ping Nikki when ready; Nikki will assign Tucker as the editor in Framer.
  - [**Meeting Logistics:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
      - [**Reschedule:** The weekly sync will be moved to an earlier time to accommodate Jo's Lisbon time zone.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
      - [**Next Sync:** Canceled due to SchoolAI's HQ week. The last call of 2024 is Dec 18.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)

### Thought Leadership & SEO Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Publish first-party research reports to build credibility and capture SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Reports are academic and may not naturally target high-volume keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [**Solution:** Publish reports as HTML pages (not PDFs) to make them crawlable and shareable.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** SchoolAI can add SEO-friendly sections (e.g., "Key Insights") without altering core research results.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Alternative:** Create a separate, SEO-optimized blog article summarizing the report, with a CTA to download the full PDF.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)

### November Performance Review

  - [**Organic & Referral Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Trend:** Traffic was flat or slightly down, which is a strong result given typical B2B seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
      - [**Top Performer:** "AI for math, transferring, learning, and teaching in education" URL.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Engagement:** High at 50–70% across the board, indicating good content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [**Google Search Console (GSC):**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [**1st-Page Queries:** Grew 42% (386 → 547).](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [**2nd-10th Page Queries:** Grew 19%.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
      - [**Significance:** This is a major win, showing a significant increase in high-visibility Google rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**Admin Demos:** The "Form filled demo request (excludes teachers)" event is the key revenue metric.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
      - [**Teacher Signups:** "User signup step two" tracks free account creation (step one is broken).](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
      - [**Product Adoption:** "AppSpace launched" tracks free users creating their first space.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
      - [Send async performance report write-up.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1949.0)
      - [Send keyword ideas for the first research report.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - Ping Nikki when Fathom topics \#6–10 are ready for review.
  - [**Nikki:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
      - Assign Tucker as editor for Fathom topics \#6–10 in Framer.
      - [Confirm with Cynthia (research lead) the preferred strategy for publishing reports (HTML page vs. summary article).](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
      - [Reschedule the weekly sync for an earlier time, starting the week of Dec 18.](https://fathom.video/share/nyhCJsrpttycRQV7kzFvt2Dx2zTSwLBM?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
